findings.description: Section s10 has an empty title string "". This section merges 概要, 特徴, and 要求 from the source but was assigned no title. An empty title prevents retrieval by title-based lookups and reduces navigability.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains top-level sections 概要, 特徴, 要求 with substantive content (overview, characteristics, requirements). The knowledge file correctly merged these into s10 but left the title field as an empty string.
